playbook.intent: Stale pattern bank -> 30-min weekly intake + filed + one usable pattern queued.
playbook.scope: Designer runs a weekly 30-minute pattern capture. Includes browsing, evaluating, tagging, filing, and queuing a usable pattern for this sprint. Done when at least one pattern is filed with rationale and queued for application.

success-criteria.criterion: At least 1 new pattern filed with tags
One usable pattern queued for this sprint
Pattern bank still findable (no junk drawer)

stage.name: Browse
stage.intent: Cast the net but stay focused.

stage.name: Evaluate
stage.intent: Decide what is signal vs noise.

stage.name: File
stage.decision-gate: Advance only after tags are applied.

tasks.task: Pick the pattern most useful this sprint
Open a design ticket to apply it
Set a check-in for the result

extra.value: [Capturing without tagging -> junk drawer, Capturing without applying -> no impact on work, Missing anti-patterns -> repeat them in your own work]
['Are tags consistent across entries?', 'Is one pattern actually applied this sprint?', 'Are anti-patterns flagged, not just admired?']

{human: faion get-content inspiration-patterns-capture-30minweek --format md, agent: faion get-content inspiration-patterns-capture-30minweek --format context, json: faion get-content inspiration-patterns-capture-30minweek --format json}
[{version: 1.0.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: Initial draft from F-059-063 chunk-05.}]
